scene: Stan on a hill at night looking up at a vast starfield, big black caps LOOK UP. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The starfield sprinkled with tiny green alien dots everywhere, big black caps FULL OF LIFE? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Little island planets each with a tiny waving figure, separated by huge dark gulfs, big black caps NONE EVER MEET. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

All the aliens present with green checks but zero meeting lines, big black caps NOT BECAUSE THEY AREN'T THERE. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A big glowing red question mark across the gulf between two islands, big black caps THE REASON IS STAGGERING. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
